debug_info.goal:
rec :
  (P Q : Prop) →
    (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) →
      ((hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp)) →
        ((hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) → (h : Disjunction P Q) → motive h
comp_left :
  ∀ (P Q : Prop) (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) (h_left : (hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp))
    (h_right : (hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) (hp : P),
    rec P Q motive h_left h_right (Disjunction.left P Q hp) = h_left hp
comp_right :
  ∀ (P Q : Prop) (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) (h_left : (hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp))
    (h_right : (hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) (hq : Q),
    rec P Q motive h_left h_right (Disjunction.right P Q hq) = h_right hq
⊢ False

failed_attempts:
let P := True
  let Q := True
  let d1 := left (by trivial)
  let d2 := right (by trivial)
  have h : d1 = d2 := by
    apply Eq.symm
    apply Eq.symm
    have : Disjunction P Q := d1
    have : Disjunction P Q := d2
    have : (fun _ : Disjunction P Q => Bool) d1 = (fun _ : Disjunction P Q => Bool) d2 := by
      congr
    simp at this
    have : rec P Q (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) d1 = true := by
      rw [comp_left]
    have : rec P Q (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) d2 = false := by
      rw [comp_right]
    simp_all
  have : True = False := by
    have : (fun _ : True => Unit) = (fun _ : False => Unit) := by
      apply congrFun
      apply congrArg
      exact h
    simp at this
  contradiction

let P := True
  let Q := True
  let d1 := left (by trivial)
  let d2 := right (by trivial)
  have h1 : d1 = d2 := by
    apply rfl
  have h2 : rec P Q (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) d1 = true := by
    rw [comp_left]
  have h3 : rec P Q (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) d2 = false := by
    rw [comp_right]
  rw [h1] at h2
  contradiction

let P : Prop := True
  let Q : Prop := True
  let d1 : Disjunction P Q := left trivial
  let d2 : Disjunction P Q := right trivial
  have h1 : d1 = d2 := by
    apply Eq.symm
    apply Eq.symm
    have : Subsingleton (Disjunction P Q) := ⟨fun _ _ => rfl⟩
    exact this d1 d2
  have h2 : rec P Q (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) d1 = true := by
    rw [comp_left]
  have h3 : rec P Q (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) d2 = false := by
    rw [comp_right]
  rw [h1] at h2
  contradiction

have h1 := rec False False (fun _ => Bool) (fun h => h.elim) (fun h => h.elim) (left (by trivial))
  have h2 := rec False False (fun _ => Bool) (fun h => h.elim) (fun h => h.elim) (right (by trivial))
  simp [comp_left, comp_right] at h1 h2

have h1 := rec True False (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) (left trivial)
  have h2 := comp_left True False (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) trivial
  have h3 := rec True False (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) (right (by trivial))
  have h4 := comp_right True False (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) (by trivial)
  simp_all

have h1 := rec True False (fun d => if d = left trivial then Bool else Unit)
    (fun _ => true) (fun _ => ⟨⟩) (left trivial)
  have h2 := comp_left True False (fun d => if d = left trivial then Bool else Unit)
    (fun _ => true) (fun _ => ⟨⟩) trivial
  simp at h1 h2
  have h3 := rec True False (fun d => if d = left trivial then Bool else Unit)
    (fun _ => false) (fun _ => ⟨⟩) (left trivial)
  have h4 := comp_left True False (fun d => if d = left trivial then Bool else Unit)

let P : Prop := True
  let Q : Prop := True
  let d1 : Disjunction P Q := left trivial
  let d2 : Disjunction P Q := right trivial
  have h1 : d1 = d2 := by
    apply Eq.symm
    apply Eq.symm
    have : d1 = d2 := by
      have : Disjunction P Q := d1
      have : Disjunction P Q := d2
      exact rfl
    exact this
  have h2 : True = False := by
    let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type
      | left _ => PUnit
      | right _ => Empty
    let h_left : ∀ hp : P, motive (left hp) := fun _ => PUnit.unit
    let h_right : ∀ hq : Q, motive (right hq) := fun _ => False.elim (by trivial)
    have eq1 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right d1 = h_left trivial := comp_left P Q motive h_left h_right trivial
    have eq2 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right d2 = h_right trivial := comp_right P Q motive h_left h_right trivial
    rw [eq1, eq2] at h1
    exact absurd PUnit.unit (by simp_all)
  exact h2 trivial

have h1 := rec False False (fun _ => Bool) (fun h => False.elim h) (fun h => False.elim h) (left (False.elim (by trivial)))
  have h2 := rec False False (fun _ => Bool) (fun h => False.elim h) (fun h => False.elim h) (right (False.elim (by trivial)))
  simp [comp_left, comp_right] at h1 h2

let P : Prop := True
  let Q : Prop := True
  let d1 : Disjunction P Q := left trivial
  let d2 : Disjunction P Q := right trivial
  have h1 : d1 = d2 := by
    apply Eq.symm
    apply Eq.symm
    have : Disjunction P Q := d1
    have : Disjunction P Q := d2
    have : (fun _ : Disjunction P Q => Unit) d1 = (fun _ : Disjunction P Q => Unit) d2 := rfl
    simp_all
  have h2 : False := by
    have : P ∧ ¬Q := ⟨trivial, fun h => by cases h⟩
    cases h1
  exact h2

let P := True
  let Q := True
  let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type := fun d =>
    match d with
    | left _ => Bool
    | right _ => Unit
  have h1 : motive (left trivial) = Bool := rfl
  have h2 : motive (right trivial) = Unit := rfl
  have h3 : rec P Q motive (fun _ => true) (fun _ => ()) (left trivial) = true := by
    rw [comp_left]
  have h4 : rec P Q motive (fun _ => true) (fun _ => ()) (right trivial) = () := by
    rw [comp_right]
  have h5 : rec P Q motive (fun _ => true) (fun _ => ()) (left trivial) =
    rec P Q motive (fun _ => true) (fun _ => ()) (right trivial) := by
    congr
  rw [h3, h4] at h5
  exact absurd h5 (by decide)

let P : Prop := True
  let Q : Prop := False
  let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type := fun d =>
    match d with
    | left _ => Bool
    | right _ => Unit
  let h_left : ∀ hp : P, motive (left hp) := fun _ => true
  let h_right : ∀ hq : Q, motive (right hq) := fun hq => hq.elim
  have h1 : motive (left trivial) = Bool := rfl
  have h2 : motive (right (by contradiction)) = Unit := rfl
  have h3 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left trivial) = true := comp_left P Q motive h_left h_right trivial
  have h4 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right (by contradiction)) = (by contradiction).elim := comp_right P Q motive h_left h_right (by contradiction)
  have h5 : Bool = Unit := by
    rw [← h1, ← h2]
    congr
    exact Disjunction.noConfusion (by simp_all)
  have h6 : false = true := by
    have : Bool ≠ Unit := by
      intro h
      have : @Eq.rec (fun _ => Sort _) Bool Unit h (⟨⟩ : Bool) : Unit := by simp_all
      contradiction
    contradiction
  contradiction

let P : Prop := True
  let Q : Prop := False
  let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type := fun d =>
    match d with
    | left _ => Bool
    | right _ => Unit
  have h1 : motive (left trivial) = Bool := rfl
  have h2 : motive (right (by contradiction)) = Unit := rfl
  have h3 : rec P Q motive (fun _ => true) (fun h => by contradiction) (left trivial) = true := by
    rw [comp_left]
  have h4 : rec P Q motive (fun _ => true) (fun h => by contradiction) (right (by contradiction)) = () := by
    rw [comp_right]
  have : Bool = Unit := by
    have : Disjunction P Q := left trivial
    have : Disjunction P Q := right (by contradiction)
    have : motive (left trivial) = motive (right (by contradiction)) := by
      congr
    simp_all
  have : false = true := by
    have : Bool = Unit := by assumption
    have : false ≠ true := by decide
    have : false = true := by
      cases this
      <;> rfl
    assumption
  contradiction

let P := True
  let Q := True
  let d1 := left (by trivial)
  let d2 := right (by trivial)
  have h1 : d1 = d2 := by
    apply Eq.symm
    apply Eq.symm
    have : Subsingleton (Disjunction P Q) := by
      intro x y
      cases x <;> cases y <;> rfl
    exact this d1 d2
  let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type := fun
    | left _ => Bool
    | right _ => Unit
  let h_left : ∀ hp : P, motive (left hp) := fun _ => true
  let h_right : ∀ hq : Q, motive (right hq) := fun _ => ()
  have h3 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right d1 = true := by
    rw [comp_left]
  have h4 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right d2 = () := by
    rw [comp_right]
  rw [h1] at h3
  exact absurd h3 (by simp)

have h1 := rec True False (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) (left trivial)
  have h2 := comp_left True False (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) trivial
  have h3 := rec True False (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => false) (fun _ => false) (left trivial)
  have h4 := comp_left True False (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => false) (fun _ => false) trivial

let P := True
  let Q := True
  let motive (d : Disjunction P Q) : Type := Bool
  let h_left (hp : P) : motive (left hp) := true
  let h_right (hq : Q) : motive (right hq) := false
  have h1 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left trivial) = true := comp_left P Q motive h_left h_right trivial
  have h2 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right trivial) = false := comp_right P Q motive h_left h_right trivial
  have h3 : left trivial = right trivial := by
    apply Eq.symm
    apply Eq.symm
    apply propext
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro h
      exact trivial
    · intro h
      exact trivial
  rw [h3] at h1
  contradiction

let P : Prop := True
  let Q : Prop := True
  let d1 : Disjunction P Q := left trivial
  let d2 : Disjunction P Q := right trivial
  have h1 : d1 = d2 := by
    have : d1 = d2 := by
      apply Eq.symm
      apply Eq.symm
      rfl
    exact this
  have h2 : P ∧ ¬Q := by
    apply And.intro
    · trivial
    · intro hq
      have : d1 = d2 := h1
      have : rec P Q (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) d1 =
             rec P Q (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) d2 := by
        rw [this]
      simp only [comp_left, comp_right] at this
      contradiction
  contradiction

let P := True
  let Q := True
  let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type := fun d =>
    match d with
    | left _ => Bool
    | right _ => Unit
  have h₁ : motive (left trivial) = Bool := rfl
  have h₂ : motive (right trivial) = Unit := rfl
  have h₃ : rec P Q motive (fun _ => true) (fun _ => ()) (left trivial) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _
  have h₄ : rec P Q motive (fun _ => true) (fun _ => ()) (right trivial) = () := comp_right _ _ _ _ _
  have h₅ : Bool = Unit := by
    have : motive (left trivial) = motive (right trivial) := by
      rw [h₁, h₂]
    exact this
  have : false = true := by
    have : Bool = Unit := h₅
    have : false ≠ true := by simp
    exact absurd rfl this
  contradiction

let P : Prop := True
  let Q : Prop := False
  let d1 : Disjunction P Q := left trivial
  let d2 : Disjunction P Q := right (by simp)
  have h1 : d1 = d2 := by
    apply Eq.symm
    apply Eq.symm
    have : rec P Q (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) d1 = true := by
      rw [comp_left]
    have : rec P Q (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) d2 = false := by
      rw [comp_right]
    simp_all
  have h2 : True = False := by
    cases h1
  exact absurd trivial h2

  let d2 := right (by trivial)

  have h2 : rec P Q (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) d1 = true := by

let P := True
  let Q := True
  let d1 := left (by trivial)
  let d2 := right (by trivial)
  have h : d1 = d2 := by
    apply Eq.recOn (rfl : d1 = d1)
    -- Since both are proofs of the same proposition `Disjunction True True`,
    -- they must be equal by proof irrelevance.
  have motive : Disjunction P Q → Type
    | left _ => Bool
    | right _ => Unit
  have h_left : ∀ hp : P, motive (left hp) := fun _ => true
  have h_right : ∀ hq : Q, motive (right hq) := fun _ => ()
  have h1 : motive d1 = Bool := rfl
  have h2 : motive d2 = Unit := rfl
  rw [h] at h1
  exact (Bool.noConfusion (Eq.trans h1 h2))

have h₁ := rec True False (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) (left trivial)
  have h₂ := comp_left True False (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) trivial
  have h₃ := rec True False (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) (right (by trivial))
  have h₄ := comp_right True False (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) (by trivial)
  simp_all

have h1 := rec False False (fun _ => Bool) (fun h => absurd h id) (fun h => absurd h id) (left (by contradiction))
  have h2 := rec False False (fun _ => Bool) (fun h => absurd h id) (fun h => absurd h id) (right (by contradiction))
  simp [comp_left, comp_right] at h1 h2

let P := True
  let Q := True
  let d1 := left (by trivial)
  let d2 := right (by trivial)
  have h : d1 = d2 := by
    apply Eq.symm
    apply Eq.symm
    have : rec P Q (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) d1 = true := by
      rw [comp_left]
    have : rec P Q (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) d2 = false := by
      rw [comp_right]
    simp_all
  have : True = False := by
    cases h
  contradiction

let P : Prop := True
  let Q : Prop := True
  let d1 : Disjunction P Q := left trivial
  let d2 : Disjunction P Q := right trivial
  have h1 : d1 = d2 := by
    apply Eq.symm
    apply Eq.symm
    have : Disjunction P Q := d1
    have : Disjunction P Q := d2
    have : True = True := rfl
    have : d1 = d2 := by
      let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type := fun _ => PUnit
      let h_left : ∀ hp : P, motive (left hp) := fun _ => PUnit.unit
      let h_right : ∀ hq : Q, motive (right hq) := fun _ => PUnit.unit
      have eq1 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right d1 = h_left trivial := comp_left P Q motive h_left h_right trivial
      have eq2 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right d2 = h_right trivial := comp_right P Q motive h_left h_right trivial
      simp at eq1 eq2
      exact Eq.refl PUnit.unit
    exact this
  have h2 : True = False := by
    let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type := fun d =>
      match d with
      | left _ => True
      | right _ => False
    let h_left : ∀ hp : P, motive (left hp) := fun _ => trivial
    let h_right : ∀ hq : Q, motive (right hq) := fun _ => False.elim (by simp)
    have eq1 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right d1 = h_left trivial := comp_left P Q motive h_left h_right trivial
    have eq2 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right d2 = h_right trivial := comp_right P Q motive h_left h_right trivial
    rw [eq1, eq2] at h1
    simp at h1
    exact h1
  exact h2 trivial

let P : Prop := True
  let Q : Prop := True
  let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type := fun d =>
    match d with
    | left _ => Bool
    | right _ => Unit
  have h₁ : motive (left trivial) = Bool := rfl
  have h₂ : motive (right trivial) = Unit := rfl
  have h₃ : rec P Q motive (fun _ => true) (fun _ => ()) (left trivial) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _
  have h₄ : rec P Q motive (fun _ => true) (fun _ => ()) (right trivial) = () := comp_right _ _ _ _ _
  have h₅ : Bool = Unit := by
    rw [← h₁, ← h₂]
    congr
    exact (Disjunction.noConfusion (by simp) (by simp))
  have : false = true := by
    have : Bool ≠ Unit := by
      intro h
      have : Unit → Bool := by rw [← h]; exact id
      have : Bool → Unit := by rw [h]; exact fun _ => ()
      have : Nonempty (Bool ≃ Unit) := by
        apply Nonempty.intro
        apply Equiv.ofBijective
        · intro x y hxy; cases x <;> cases y <;> simp_all
        · intro x; cases x <;> simp_all
      have : Nat.card Bool = Nat.card Unit := by
        apply Eq.symm
        apply Eq.symm
        apply Nat.card_congr
        exact this.some
      simp at this
  contradiction
